title: Map stdlib unit tests
description:
Create pkg/stdlib/map_ops_test.go with comprehensive unit tests for all 12 map functions.

Test cases (see goal spec section 9.1):
- TestMapNewAndLen: create empty map, verify len=0
- TestMapSetAndGet: set string key to int value, get it back, verify len=1
- TestMapContainsAndDelete: verify contains returns false, set key, verify true, delete, verify false
- TestMapGetMissing: verify error contains "key not found"
- TestMapIntKeys: use IntVal keys, verify get works
- TestMapOverwrite: set same key twice, verify value updates and len stays 1
- TestMapKeysAndValues: set 2 entries, verify keys/values arrays have length 2
- TestMapMerge: merge two maps with overlapping key, verify m2 wins
- TestMapEntries: verify returns array of tuples with correct key/value pairs
- TestMapDeleteNonexistent: verify silent success
- TestMapMixedKeyTypes: use Int and String keys in same map

Use vm.NewHeap() for each test. Use t.Fatalf for assertion failures. Import testing, strings, github.com/ryx-lang/ryx/pkg/vm.
